chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No.S-1206 of 2015 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of CMA No.5734/2019. 04.02.2021 Petitioner Mst. Rukhsana, present in person. Mr. Muhammad Naeem Memon, Advocate along with alleged contemnors No.1, 3 & 4. -x-x-x-x-x- Alleged contemnors namely Zulfiqar, Nasibullah and Ali Gohar are present along with their counsel. Petitioner present in person, submits that hand of her daughter Mst. Mariam was given to one Mureed/contemnor No.5 by her late husband; however, said Mureed has married with other woman and out of said wedlock he has four children. She, therefore, submits that alleged contemnors are exerting pressure upon her to give hand of her daughter or to pay some amount as compensation. She; however, further admits that no Nikkah was solemnized except mere oral undertaking by her late husband/father of Mst. Mariam. She adds that mere an undertaking of her late husband, cannot be termed as Nikkah particularly when there is no consent of the girl. On the other hand, learned counsel for alleged contemnors admits contention raised by the petitioner to the extent that alleged contemnor Mureed has married with other woman and out of said wedlock he has got four children. As far as, allegation of petitioner regarding payment of compensation in lieu of hand of her daughter Mst. Mariam carries no force and they will not harass her in future. They further stated that they have no nexus or concern with Mariam and it is up to the petitioner to decide her fate. In view of above statement of the alleged contemnors, petitioner shows her satisfaction and seeks disposal of the listed application.

They further stated that they have no nexus or concern with Mariam and it is up to the petitioner to decide her fate. In view of above statement of the alleged contemnors, petitioner shows her satisfaction and seeks disposal of the listed application. Accordingly, listed application bearing CMA No.5734/2019 is hereby disposed of with directions to police/respondents to provide protection to the petitioner as and when she may approach to them. JUDGE Zulfiqar/P.A
